understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win the level, while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that cause instant failure. Complete levels efficiently within the turn budget (50 turns per attempt, 2 attempts per level).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is restricted to horizontal actions (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each horizontal move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y values/y=0 at top, or UP toward higher y values) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK actions remove breakable blocks (`x` tiles) without advancing timers like the moving platform. UNDO reverts the previous action. Corridor scan and landing previews help identify safe passages to new sections. Spikes end the run immediately upon landing.
